He {{4}} (think) it is really complicated. His sister {{5}} (listen) to music in the next room. She {{6}} (prefer) pop music. Tom {{7}} (not/like) the noise, but he {{8}} (not/want) to argue. He {{9}} (need) to concentrate. He {{10}} (believe) he can pass if he studies hard enough. Outside, his friends {{11}} (play) basketball. Tom {{12}} (want) to join them, but he knows he must stay and study.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một buổi sáng điển hình của bạn từ lúc thức dậy đến lúc đi làm/đi học. Dùng kết hợp cả stative verbs (know, like, want, need...) và dynamic verbs ở thì phù hợp. Chỉ rõ những gì bạn thường làm (thói quen) và những gì bạn đang làm ngay lúc này.
writing_prompts.example: Every morning, I wake up at 6:30 AM. I love the quiet early morning hours. I usually have a cup of coffee and some toast for breakfast because I need my caffeine to feel awake! Right now, as I write this, I am sitting at my kitchen table and listening to the birds outside. I know that today will be a busy day at work. I prefer to take the bus to the office because I don't like driving in traffic. At the moment, I am wearing my favourite blue jacket. I believe a good morning routine makes the whole day better.

writing_prompts.vi: Bạn đang ngồi ở một quán cà phê hoặc công viên. Mô tả những gì đang xảy ra xung quanh bạn ngay lúc này (dùng present continuous với dynamic verbs) và những điều bạn cảm nhận, nghĩ, thích về khung cảnh đó (dùng stative verbs ở simple tense).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: stative verbs vs dynamic verbs in context
writing_prompts.example: I am sitting in my favourite café near the university. The place smells wonderful – I think it's a mix of fresh coffee and cinnamon. A group of students is sitting near the window and talking loudly. A woman is reading a thick book. I don't know what it is, but it looks interesting. The barista is making coffee and the machine sounds very loud. I love this café because it feels comfortable and relaxed. I know most of the staff here – they are very friendly. I prefer this place to any other café in the city. At the moment, I am just enjoying my coffee and watching the world go by. I don't want to leave!

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một người bạn thân hoặc thành viên gia đình yêu thích của bạn. Kết hợp stative verbs để nói về tính cách/sở thích của họ và dynamic verbs để mô tả những gì họ thường làm hoặc đang làm.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: stative verbs for personality/preference, dynamic verbs for actions
writing_prompts.example: My best friend Minh is one of the most interesting people I know. He loves cooking and knows hundreds of recipes from different countries. He believes that food brings people together. He doesn't like wasting time and always prefers to be doing something useful. Right now, he is studying for a qualification in nutrition because he wants to open his own healthy restaurant one day. He owns a small collection of cookbooks that he reads in his spare time. Minh understands people very well and always knows the right thing to say when I feel sad. He needs very little sleep – he is always the last to go to bed and the first to wake up!

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một đoạn hội thoại (hoặc kể lại một cuộc trò chuyện) giữa bạn và một người bạn mới gặp. Sử dụng stative verbs để nói về sở thích, ý kiến, cảm xúc và dynamic verbs để mô tả hành động đang xảy ra trong cuộc gặp gỡ đó.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: stative vs dynamic verbs in conversation context
writing_prompts.example: Last Saturday, I met a very interesting person at a language exchange event. Her name was Sophie, and she came from France. We were both standing near the food table when she smiled and said hello. I asked her what she was studying. She told me she was learning Vietnamese because she loves the culture. I said I think Vietnamese is a beautiful language and I want to learn French myself. We discovered that we both prefer learning languages in a natural way rather than from textbooks. We agreed that speaking to real people is the best method. Sophie said she doesn't know many people in the city yet, so I offered to show her some good local restaurants because I know this area very well.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một hoạt động nhóm hoặc dự án bạn đang thực hiện (ở trường hoặc nơi làm việc). Giải thích mục tiêu của dự án (stative verbs: believe, know, think, want), mô tả những việc mọi người đang làm ngay lúc này (dynamic verbs: continuous), và chia sẻ cảm nhận của bạn về dự án đó.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: stative and dynamic verbs for project/group work context
writing_prompts.example: Our class is currently working on a big group project about environmental issues. I believe this is the most important topic we have studied all year. Right now, my classmate Lan is researching facts about ocean pollution, while Huy is designing some infographic posters. I am writing the introduction for our report. We all think the project will be very interesting for our classmates to see. We know our deadline is next Friday, so we need to work hard. I prefer working in groups because I understand things better when we discuss them together. Our teacher is helping us and she doesn't want us to feel stressed. I don't know exactly how it will look at the end, but I am feeling excited about the result.

elementary.title: A2 Phrasal verbs: Transitive and intransitive, separable and inseparable
elementary.content:
📌 Phrasal verb là gì?
Phrasal verbs = động từ + particle (giới từ hoặc trạng từ). Khi kết hợp, nghĩa thường thay đổi hoàn toàn so với động từ gốc.

wake + up = wake up (thức dậy)  |  throw + away = throw away (vứt đi)
pick + up = pick up (nhặt lên / đón ai)  |  look + after = look after (chăm sóc)

Particle = phần thêm vào động từ (up, down, off, out, away, after, on, in, back...)
🔵 Intransitive phrasal verbs (Không có tân ngữ) = INSEPARABLE
Intransitive = không cần tân ngữ. Động từ và particle luôn đứng cạnh nhau, không thể tách ra.

Phrasal verbNghĩaVí dụ
wake upthức dậyI wake up at 7 AM.
sit downngồi xuốngPlease sit down.
grow uplớn lênShe grew up in Paris.
break downhỏng máyMy car broke down yesterday.
🟢 Transitive phrasal verbs — Separable (Tách được)
Separable = có thể đặt tân ngữ giữa động từ và particle, HOẶC sau particle.
⚠️ Khi tân ngữ là đại từ (it, them, him, her...) → PHẢI đặt giữa, KHÔNG đặt sau particle!

Phrasal verbNghĩaTách đượcĐại từ
turn offtắtTurn off the light / Turn the light off ✅Turn it off ✅ / ❌Turn off it
put onmặc vàoPut on your coat / Put your coat on ✅Put it on ✅
pick upnhặt / đónPick up the keys / Pick the keys up ✅Pick them up ✅
throw awayvứt điThrow away the rubbish / Throw the rubbish away ✅Throw it away ✅
🔴 Transitive phrasal verbs — Inseparable (Không tách được)
Inseparable = tân ngữ LUÔN đứng sau particle, không thể đặt giữa!

Phrasal verbNghĩaVí dụ đúng ✅Sai ❌
look afterchăm sócShe looks after her sister.❌ She looks her sister after.
get on withhòa hợpI get on with my colleagues.❌ I get my colleagues on with.
look forward tomong chờI look forward to the weekend.❌ I look the weekend forward to.
run intotình cờ gặpI ran into an old friend.❌ I ran an old friend into.

💡 Mẹo nhớ: Phrasal verbs với 2 particles (look forward to, get on with) luôn inseparable.

exercises.q: Can you turn ___ the lights? It's too dark in here.
exercises.exp: turn on = separable; tân ngữ 'the lights' là danh từ → có thể đặt sau particle: turn on the lights

exercises.q: I ran ___ an old school friend at the supermarket yesterday.
exercises.exp: run into (= tình cờ gặp) = inseparable; tân ngữ luôn đặt sau particle

exercises.q: Please turn off your phone. Can you turn ___ now?
exercises.opts: it off,off it,the phone off,off the phone
exercises.exp: Tân ngữ là đại từ 'it' → PHẢI đặt giữa: turn it off

exercises.q: She grew ___ in a small village in the countryside.
exercises.exp: grow up = intransitive (không tân ngữ) → inseparable, luôn: grew up

exercises.q: Could you look ___ my cat while I'm away on holiday?
exercises.exp: look after (= chăm sóc) = inseparable; 'my cat' đặt sau particle

exercises.q: He picked ___ from the airport last night.
exercises.exp: pick up = separable; đại từ 'her' phải đặt giữa: picked her up

exercises.q: My car ___ on the motorway this morning.
exercises.opts: broke down,broke it down,broken down,break down
exercises.exp: break down = intransitive → không có tân ngữ, quá khứ: broke down

exercises.q: I look forward ___ seeing you next week.
exercises.exp: look forward to = cụm cố định (inseparable), dùng 'to'

exercises.q: She threw ___ all her old magazines.
exercises.exp: throw away = separable; 'all her old magazines' là danh từ → có thể đặt sau

exercises.q: Do you get on ___ your new flatmates?
exercises.exp: get on with (= hòa hợp) = inseparable; dùng 'with'

exercises.q: Can you put ___ before we go out? It's cold outside.
exercises.opts: your coat on,on your coat,your coat after,your coat in
exercises.exp: put on = separable; cả hai vị trí đều đúng với danh từ

exercises.q: Don't throw ___ – I might need it later!
exercises.opts: it away,away it,the paper away,them away
exercises.exp: Tân ngữ là đại từ 'it' → PHẢI đặt giữa: throw it away

exercises.q: What time do you usually ___ in the morning?
exercises.opts: wake up,wake it up,get up yourself,wake up you
exercises.exp: wake up = intransitive → inseparable, không có tân ngữ

exercises.q: She takes ___ her father – they have the same eyes.
exercises.exp: take after (= giống ai) = inseparable; tân ngữ sau particle

exercises.q: I need to write ___ her phone number.
exercises.exp: write down = separable; 'her phone number' là danh từ → sau particle

exercises.q: Please don't give ___ – you're nearly finished!
exercises.exp: give up (= từ bỏ) ở đây là intransitive → inseparable

exercises.q: Turn off the television. Turn ___!
exercises.opts: it off,off it,the TV off,off the TV
exercises.exp: Đại từ 'it' thay thế 'television' → PHẢI đặt giữa: turn it off

exercises.q: He came across ___ interesting information online.
exercises.exp: come across (= tình cờ tìm thấy) = inseparable; tân ngữ sau particle

exercises.q: I put ___ at 7 AM every day.
exercises.opts: my alarm on,on my alarm,the alarm on me,my alarm at
exercises.exp: put on = separable; danh từ có thể đặt sau particle

exercises.q: She called ___ because she was sick.
exercises.opts: off the meeting,the meeting off,it off,all three are correct
exercises.exp: call off = separable; cả 3 hình thức đều đúng

exercises.q: Please turn ___ the television. I'm trying to study.
exercises.exp: turn off = separable transitive phrasal verb (tắt)

exercises.q: I ran into my old teacher. I ran ___ (she) at the market.
exercises.exp: run into = inseparable; đại từ vẫn đặt sau particle

exercises.q: He wrote down the address. He wrote ___ (it) in his notebook.
exercises.exp: write down = separable; đại từ PHẢI đặt giữa: it down

exercises.q: She grew ___ in a big family with four brothers.
exercises.exp: grow up = intransitive inseparable, không có tân ngữ

exercises.q: Can you look ___ my dog this weekend? I'm going away.
I'm looking forward ___ the concert next Friday.
exercises.exp: look forward to = inseparable (mong chờ) + to

exercises.q: Don't throw away those letters. Don't throw ___ (they)!
exercises.exp: throw away = separable; đại từ 'them' PHẢI đặt giữa

exercises.q: My phone broke ___ in the middle of an important call.
Can you pick ___ (I) from the station at six o'clock?
exercises.exp: pick up = separable; đại từ 'me' PHẢI đặt giữa

exercises.q: She doesn't get on ___ her sister very well.
exercises.exp: get on with = inseparable (hòa hợp) + with

exercises.q: Put on your jacket. It's cold. Put ___ (it) now!
exercises.exp: put on = separable; đại từ 'it' PHẢI đặt giữa

exercises.q: He takes ___ his mother – both are very patient people.
exercises.exp: take after = inseparable (giống ai về tính cách)

exercises.q: She gave ___ smoking after her doctor's advice.
exercises.exp: give up = transitive inseparable (từ bỏ); 'smoking' đặt sau

exercises.q: I came ___ an old photo album in the attic.
exercises.exp: come across = inseparable (tình cờ tìm thấy)

exercises.q: Please sit ___ and make yourself comfortable.
Turn off the music. Can you turn ___ (it) please?
exercises.exp: turn off = separable; đại từ 'it' PHẢI đặt giữa: it off

exercises.q: He called ___ the meeting because of bad weather.
She looked ___ a new job online for two hours.
I need to write down her address. I need to write ___ (it).
exercises.exp: write down = separable; đại từ 'it' đặt giữa: write it down

exercises.q: The children always cheer ___ when they see the ice cream van.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả buổi sáng điển hình của bạn từ lúc thức dậy đến lúc rời khỏi nhà. Sử dụng ít nhất 6 phrasal verbs khác nhau (wake up, get up, put on, turn on/off, pick up, set off...) và giải thích rõ hành động của từng người trong gia đình bạn.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: intransitive phrasal verbs, separable and inseparable transitive phrasal verbs
writing_prompts.example: Every morning in my house is quite chaotic. I usually wake up at 6:30 when my alarm goes off. I get up slowly and turn on the bathroom light. Then I put on my work clothes and go downstairs. My mum is already in the kitchen — she wakes up earlier than anyone else. She turns on the radio and picks up her coffee mug. My little brother is always looking for his school bag at the last minute. He throws his things around and picks them up again in a panic. I usually turn off the lights and the television before we leave. We set off at 7:45. Once, I came across my old diary when looking for my keys — it made me laugh!

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một người bạn hoặc thành viên gia đình mà bạn thực sự hòa hợp (hay không hòa hợp) và lý do tại sao. Dùng các phrasal verbs như get on with, take after, grow up, look up to, look after, come across để mô tả mối quan hệ và tính cách của hai người.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: inseparable phrasal verbs in relationship context
writing_prompts.example: My cousin Hoa is probably the person I get on with best in my whole family. We grew up together in the same neighbourhood, so we have always been close. She takes after our grandmother — she is patient, warm and very creative. I really look up to her because she has worked so hard to become a successful architect. She always looks after me when I feel down and never gives up on me even when I make mistakes. Last month, I ran into her unexpectedly at a bookshop downtown. She was looking through some old design books and came across a photo of our grandmother's house. It was a wonderful surprise that brought back so many happy memories for both of us.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một quyết định lớn trong cuộc đời bạn hoặc của người thân (thay đổi công việc, chuyển nhà, bỏ thói quen xấu...). Dùng các phrasal verbs có thể tách (separable): give up, take on, carry out, turn down, call off, write down, throw away... để mô tả quá trình đó.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: separable phrasal verbs with noun and pronoun objects
writing_prompts.example: Two years ago, my father made a very brave decision. He gave up his well-paid job at a bank and set up his own small café. My mother was worried at first and wrote down all the risks in a notebook. She even tried to talk him out of it and suggested he put off the decision for another year. But my father had already turned down a promotion at the bank and called off his plans to stay. He threw away his old business cards and took on the challenge with great excitement. He carried out his plan step by step. Now the café is successful, and he picks up more customers every week. He says he should have done it years ago. My whole family looks back on that decision with admiration.

writing_prompts.vi: Bạn đang giúp một người bạn nước ngoài mới đến Việt Nam lần đầu tiên. Mô tả cách bạn hướng dẫn họ đi lại, tham quan thành phố, và những tình huống thú vị xảy ra. Sử dụng nhiều loại phrasal verbs khác nhau (separable, inseparable, intransitive).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: mixed phrasal verbs in narrating context
writing_prompts.example: Last month, my friend Emma from Australia visited me in Ho Chi Minh City. I picked her up from the airport at midnight. The next morning, we set off early to explore the city. I showed her around the old quarter and we came across a beautiful temple that wasn't in any guidebook. Emma wrote down the address so she could tell her friends. In the afternoon, we sat down at a street café and ordered bánh mì. A cat ran into the café and sat on Emma's bag — we threw away the wrapping from our food before the cat got it! We ran into my neighbour at the market, which was a funny coincidence. Emma looked after herself very well and got on with everyone she met. She looked forward to every new experience and never gave up trying the local food, even the unusual ones!

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một ngày tình cờ xảy ra nhiều sự việc bất ngờ với bạn: gặp lại người cũ, tìm thấy thứ gì đó, gặp vấn đề với phương tiện đi lại... Sử dụng ít nhất 8 phrasal verbs khác nhau và chú ý đặt tân ngữ đúng vị trí (đặc biệt khi dùng đại từ).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: all types of phrasal verbs: word order with pronouns
writing_prompts.example: Last Tuesday was the strangest day of my life. I woke up late because my phone had broken down during the night and the alarm didn't work. I set off for work in a panic, but my scooter broke down on the highway. While I was waiting for help, I ran into my old school friend Trung, who was passing by on his bicycle. He picked me up on the back and cycled to the nearest garage. On the way, I came across an old wallet on the ground. I picked it up and found some cash and an ID card inside. I wrote down the contact information so I could return it to the owner. Eventually, I turned on my laptop to email my boss. He had already called off the morning meeting, so I wasn't actually late for anything important. It turned out to be a lucky day after all!
